title: codereview-pass2: Incomplete CCP-16 coverage
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md lacks dedicated sections for TDMA slots calculation (fnv1a32 details, modulo), channel agility, time sync (epoch_floor, stratum, wall_clock_valid), hash selection per test vectors and parent epic. close_reason: Addressed in edit: added dedicated subsections 2a.2-2a.5 covering all elements, SFN modulo, test vector refs, FSM stub. P2 resolved. 3 clean passes now complete with only P4 remaining.
